allow: Bash(node -e "const sass = require\(''''sass''''\); const r = sass.renderSync\({data: ""@use ''''@angular/material'''' as mat; $x: mat.$yellow-palette;""}\); console.log\(''''ok''''\)")

Bash(node -e "const {tags} = require\(''@lezer/highlight''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(tags\).filter\(k => k.includes\(''code''\) || k.includes\(''Code''\) || k.includes\(''mono''\) || k.includes\(''Mono''\)\).join\('', ''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('version'\), d.get\('main'\), d.get\('exports', {}\)\)")
